title: senecio sericeus var. gilliesii
intro: Senecio sericeus var. gilliesii, also known as Velvet Groundsel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, due to the presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and acting as a natural expectorant. In herbal preparations, Velvet Groundsel is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and long-term health risks.
